baseline_claim: Each lexical or constructional frame has a learned agreement preference; controller identification and notional basis are not needed.
what_it_can_match: Known or already observed QN/collective agreement profiles can be accommodated as local listed preferences.
discriminator: Low-frequency or novel animate plural QN frames where item-specific listing has little stored preference to appeal to.
next_action: The first direct-string tranche was all zero. Run the denominator-only `low-frequency-qn-scout`, select eligible frames with `scripts/select_agr_listing_v2_candidates.py`, then register finite-agreement follow-up strings before interpreting.
